lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches or dents. The interior shows no signs of wear. The engine is in perfect operating condition.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and restoration lovers! This vehicle offers a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a dedicated project car. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to return to its former glory, it serves as an affordable foundation for your next big build!
The car is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. It is mechanically perfect and has no known issues.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a dependable commuter, though it does show its age. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door, along with some clear coat peeling on the trunk lid. Inside, the fabric seats show some staining and wear on the driver's side bolster, though all electronics and the air conditioning remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but it will likely need new brake pads and a set of tires within the next few months. It has been maintained regularly, though service records are only partial for the last two years. This would make a solid daily driver for someone who doesn't mind a few cosmetic imperfections and minor upcoming maintenance.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows signs of regular use over the years. The exterior has several cosmetic blemishes, including noticeable scratches on the passenger side and some clear coat peeling on the hood. The interior is functional but does show significant wear, particularly a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery and some staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car is operational and has been used as a daily driver, though it will likely require some upcoming maintenance, such as a brake service and possibly new tires in the near future. While it is not in perfect shape, it remains a reliable transportation option for someone looking for a more affordable entry point. We have priced it accordingly to reflect its current state and the work it may need.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Characterized by its mechanical integrity and refined interior, it offers a seamless integration of performance and reliability. Every component has been meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for road-readiness and comfort. This is a sophisticated acquisition for those who demand excellence and longevity in their automotive investments.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved. Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready for its next adventure. Runs smooth and looks great—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a well-maintained 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit delivers linear power delivery via six individual throttle bodies and is mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Notable mechanical highlights include a recently overhauled VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to address common chassis fatigue. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing MacPherson struts up front and a multi-link rear setup, providing exceptional lateral grip. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the driveline remains robust, benefiting from consistent fluid intervals and a recent valve
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior features a sophisticated deep metallic finish that still catches the light beautifully, though it shows minor signs of careful use typical for its age. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with premium leather seating that remains supple and supportive. Every feature, from the responsive touchscreen infotainment system to the panoramic sunroof, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of timely synthetic oil changes and a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. With a set of high-thread tires and fresh brake pads, this car is ready for the road immediately. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable ride without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies engineering excellence and sophisticated design. This automobile has been meticulously maintained, ensuring reliable performance and a refined driving experience. Its aesthetic appeal remains strong, offering a professional presentation suitable for the discerning buyer. We invite you to experience this exceptional value, which stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and enduring utility.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of sophisticated engineering and proven value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in a condition that reflects careful stewardship, it offers a refined driving experience supported by mechanical integrity. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, this model stands as a testament to durability and style. It is an exceptional acquisition for those who demand a high standard of performance without compromising on fiscal prudence.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car, and honestly, she’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who wants a dependable ride without the brand-new price tag. It’s got a few miles of memories on it, but it’s been well-loved and is ready to hit the road with you today! Feel free to reach out with any questions; I'd love to chat!

This 2008 Porsche Cayman S features a mid-mounted 3.4L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering linear power through a 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis remains composed with PASM-equipped active dampers and updated control arm bushings. Meticulously serviced, it includes a documented IMS bearing inspection and a recently replaced Air Oil Separator (AOS). Braking performance is anchored by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, ensuring minimal fade. While exhibiting typical road wear consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering the precise steering rack feedback and visceral exhaust

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it’s ready to hit the road for its next big adventure! It drives like a dream and is just waiting for a new home. If you’re looking for a dependable, great-looking car that’s ready to go, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power via individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain consists of a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment. The chassis retains its signature balance with a well-damped suspension and upgraded bushings for improved steering geometry. A mechanically sound example of BMW's finest high-revving engineering.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained 2018 luxury SUV that perfectly balances sophisticated performance with everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor signs of road use, while the interior features premium leather seating that has been kept smoke-free and well-conditioned. Mechanically, this vehicle is in great health; the engine runs quietly, the transmission shifts smoothly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, stable ride. It comes equipped with a panoramic sunroof, an intuitive navigation system, and a suite of advanced safety features. All scheduled maintenance is up to date, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. This is a dependable, well-cared-for vehicle that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver who values both mechanical integrity and sophisticated presentation. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating a consistent history of care, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and reliable performance. It stands as a testament to quality engineering, providing a superior balance of luxury and utility for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and daily utility. The exterior shines in its original factory finish, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment with premium upholstery that remains firm and comfortable, showing just light softening on the driver’s side bolster. All electronics, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system and navigation, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car has been serviced ahead of schedule; the engine runs smoothly without any leaks, and the transmission shifts crisply through every gear. With recent tire replacements and a full brake service completed within the last 3,000 miles, this car is turn-key and ready for its next owner. Includes a complete service history, a full set of keys, and the original owner’s manuals.
